---
title: "大学・リーグ一覧"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{r setup}
source("common_site.R", local = TRUE)

team_series <- team_game_log |>
  filter(gamedate <= Sys.Date()) |>
  arrange(team, event_id) |>
  transmute(
    team,
    event_id,
    TeamName = team_name,
    color = team_color,
    event_datetime,
    x_value = format(event_datetime, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S"),
    date_key = format(gamedate, "%Y-%m-%d"),
    rating = round(rating_after, 1),
    year = year
  )

league_series <- league_history |>
  arrange(LeagueName, event_id) |>
  transmute(
    event_id,
    league = LeagueName,
    event_datetime,
    x_value = format(event_datetime, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S"),
    date_key = format(date, "%Y-%m-%d"),
    rating = display_rating,
    year
  )

default_team_ids <- current_team_table |>
  slice_head(n = min(10, nrow(current_team_table))) |>
  pull(team)

default_leagues <- current_league_table |>
  slice_head(n = min(5, nrow(current_league_table))) |>
  pull(LeagueName)

default_start_year <- current_year
default_end_year <- current_year

build_team_plot <- function(selected_teams, start_year, end_year) {
  plot_df <- team_series |>
    filter(team %in% selected_teams, year >= start_year, year <= end_year)

  if (nrow(plot_df) == 0) {
    return(
      plot_ly() |>
        layout(
          paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
          plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
          xaxis = list(visible = FALSE),
          yaxis = list(visible = FALSE),
          annotations = list(
            list(text = "NO DATA", showarrow = FALSE, font = list(size = 16))
          )
        ) |>
        config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
    )
  }

  plot_ly() |>
    layout(
      paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.96)",
      margin = list(l = 48, r = 20, t = 20, b = 44),
      xaxis = list(title = ""),
      yaxis = list(title = "RATING"),
      legend = list(orientation = "h", x = 0, y = 1.12)
    ) |>
    config(displayModeBar = FALSE, responsive = TRUE)
}

build_league_plot <- function(selected_leagues, start_year, end_year) {
  plot_df <- league_series |>
    filter(league %in% selected_leagues, year >= start_year, year <= end_year)

  if (nrow(plot_df) == 0) {
    return(
      plot_ly() |>
        layout(
          paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
          plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
          xaxis = list(visible = FALSE),
          yaxis = list(visible = FALSE),
          annotations = list(
            list(text = "NO DATA", showarrow = FALSE, font = list(size = 16))
          )
        ) |>
        config(displayModeBar = FALSE)
    )
  }

  plot_ly() |>
    layout(
      paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
      plot_bgcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.96)",
      margin = list(l = 48, r = 20, t = 20, b = 44),
      xaxis = list(title = ""),
      yaxis = list(title = "RATING"),
      legend = list(orientation = "h", x = 0, y = 1.12)
    ) |>
    config(displayModeBar = FALSE, responsive = TRUE)
}

team_plot_payload <- list(
  rows = team_series,
  defaultIds = default_team_ids
)

league_plot_payload <- list(
  rows = league_series,
  defaultIds = default_leagues
)
```

::: {.minimal-hero}
<div class="minimal-kicker">BROWSE</div>
<h1 class="minimal-title">UNIVERSITIES &amp; LEAGUES</h1>
<div class="hero-meta-strip">
  <span>UNIV `r nrow(current_team_table)`</span>
  <span>LEAGUE `r nrow(current_league_table)`</span>
  <span>RANGE `r min(available_years)`-`r max(available_years)`</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.anchor-nav}
<a href="#university-browser">UNIVERSITY</a>
<a href="#league-browser">LEAGUE</a>
:::

## UNIVERSITY {#university-browser}

```{r university-controls}
div(
  class = "browser-controls",
  div(
    class = "control-block",
    tags$label(`for` = "team-multi-select", class = "control-label", "UNIVERSITY"),
    tags$select(
      id = "team-multi-select",
      class = "control-input control-multi",
      multiple = "multiple",
      lapply(seq_len(nrow(current_team_table)), function(i) {
        row <- current_team_table[i, ]
        tags$option(
          value = row$team,
          selected = if (row$team %in% default_team_ids) "selected" else NULL,
          row$TeamName
        )
      })
    )
  ),
  div(
    class = "control-block control-block-year",
    tags$label(`for` = "team-start-year", class = "control-label", "FROM"),
    tags$select(
      id = "team-start-year",
      class = "control-input",
      lapply(available_years, function(yr) {
        tags$option(value = yr, selected = if (yr == default_start_year) "selected" else NULL, yr)
      })
    )
  ),
  div(
    class = "control-block control-block-year",
    tags$label(`for` = "team-end-year", class = "control-label", "TO"),
    tags$select(
      id = "team-end-year",
      class = "control-input",
      lapply(available_years, function(yr) {
        tags$option(value = yr, selected = if (yr == default_end_year) "selected" else NULL, yr)
      })
    )
  )
)
```

```{r university-plot}
build_team_plot(default_team_ids, default_start_year, default_end_year) |>
  htmlwidgets::onRender(
    "function(el, x, data) {
      const select = document.getElementById('team-multi-select');
      const start = document.getElementById('team-start-year');
      const end = document.getElementById('team-end-year');
      const rows = data.rows || [];
      const defaultIds = data.defaultIds || [];

      function parseDateKey(value) {
        return new Date(value + 'T00:00:00');
      }

      function formatTickLabel(date, singleYear) {
        const year = String(date.getFullYear());
        const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
        const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
        return singleYear ? (month + '/' + day) : (year + '/' + month);
      }

      function addMonths(date, count) {
        const next = new Date(date.getTime());
        next.setMonth(next.getMonth() + count);
        return next;
      }

      function selectedValues() {
        const values = Array.from(select.selectedOptions).map(function(opt) { return opt.value; });
        return values.length ? values : defaultIds;
      }

      function buildAxis(filtered, startYear, endYear) {
        const events = [];
        const seen = new Set();

        filtered
          .slice()
          .sort(function(a, b) { return Number(a.event_id) - Number(b.event_id); })
          .forEach(function(row) {
            const key = String(row.event_id);
            if (!seen.has(key)) {
              seen.add(key);
              events.push({
                eventId: Number(row.event_id),
                dateKey: row.date_key
              });
            }
          });

        const slotMap = {};
        events.forEach(function(event, index) {
          slotMap[event.eventId] = index + 1;
        });

        if (!events.length) {
          return { slotMap: slotMap, tickvals: [], ticktext: [] };
        }

        const firstDate = parseDateKey(events[0].dateKey);
        const lastDate = parseDateKey(events[events.length - 1].dateKey);
        const singleYear = startYear === endYear;
        const tickvals = [];
        const ticktext = [];

        function pushTick(targetDate, fallbackEvent) {
          const targetKey = targetDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
          const matchedEvent = events.find(function(event) {
            return event.dateKey >= targetKey;
          }) || fallbackEvent;

          if (!matchedEvent) {
            return;
          }

          const slot = slotMap[matchedEvent.eventId];
          if (tickvals.length && tickvals[tickvals.length - 1] === slot) {
            return;
          }

          tickvals.push(slot);
          ticktext.push(formatTickLabel(parseDateKey(matchedEvent.dateKey), singleYear));
        }

        if (singleYear) {
          let cursor = new Date(firstDate.getTime());
          while (cursor <= lastDate) {
            pushTick(cursor, null);
            cursor = new Date(cursor.getTime() + 14 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
          }
        } else {
          const totalMonths = (lastDate.getFullYear() - firstDate.getFullYear()) * 12 +
            (lastDate.getMonth() - firstDate.getMonth()) + 1;
          const monthStep = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(totalMonths / 8));
          let cursor = new Date(firstDate.getFullYear(), firstDate.getMonth(), 1);
          while (cursor <= lastDate) {
            pushTick(cursor, null);
            cursor = addMonths(cursor, monthStep);
          }
        }

        pushTick(firstDate, events[0]);
        pushTick(lastDate, events[events.length - 1]);

        return { slotMap: slotMap, tickvals: tickvals, ticktext: ticktext };
      }

      function buildChart(selectedIds, startYear, endYear) {
        const filtered = rows.filter(function(row) {
          return selectedIds.indexOf(row.team) >= 0 && row.year >= startYear && row.year <= endYear;
        }).slice().sort(function(a, b) {
          if (a.team !== b.team) {
            return String(a.team).localeCompare(String(b.team), 'ja');
          }
          return Number(a.event_id) - Number(b.event_id);
        });

        const axis = buildAxis(filtered, startYear, endYear);

        if (!filtered.length) {
          return {
            traces: [{
              x: [],
              y: [],
              type: 'scatter',
              mode: 'lines'
            }],
            axis: axis
          };
        }

        const grouped = {};
        filtered.forEach(function(row) {
          if (!grouped[row.team]) {
            grouped[row.team] = {
              x: [],
              y: [],
              name: row.TeamName,
              mode: 'lines+markers',
              type: 'scatter',
              connectgaps: true,
              line: { color: row.color, width: 3 },
              marker: { size: 5, color: row.color },
              customdata: [],
              hovertemplate: '%{customdata}<br>' + row.TeamName + ': %{y:.1f}<extra></extra>'
            };
          }
          grouped[row.team].x.push(axis.slotMap[Number(row.event_id)]);
          grouped[row.team].y.push(row.rating);
          grouped[row.team].customdata.push(row.date_key);
        });

        return {
          traces: Object.keys(grouped).map(function(key) { return grouped[key]; }),
          axis: axis
        };
      }

      function render() {
        let startYear = Number(start.value);
        let endYear = Number(end.value);
        if (startYear > endYear) {
          const next = startYear;
          startYear = endYear;
          endYear = next;
        }
        const selectedIds = selectedValues();
        const chart = buildChart(selectedIds, startYear, endYear);
        Plotly.react(el, chart.traces, {
          paper_bgcolor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0)',
          plot_bgcolor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.96)',
          margin: { l: 48, r: 20, t: 20, b: 44 },
          xaxis: {
            title: '',
            tickmode: 'array',
            tickvals: chart.axis.tickvals,
            ticktext: chart.axis.ticktext,
            showgrid: true,
            gridcolor: 'rgba(23,50,74,0.14)',
            zeroline: false
          },
          yaxis: { title: 'RATING' },
          legend: { orientation: 'h', x: 0, y: 1.12 }
        }, { displayModeBar: false, responsive: true });
      }

      [select, start, end].forEach(function(node) {
        node.addEventListener('change', render);
      });

      render();
    }",
    data = team_plot_payload
  )
```

```{r university-table}
div(
  class = "table-shell",
  build_university_table(
    current_team_table,
    page_size = nrow(current_team_table),
    searchable = TRUE,
    show_pagination = FALSE
  )
)
```

## LEAGUE {#league-browser}

```{r league-controls}
div(
  class = "browser-controls",
  div(
    class = "control-block",
    tags$label(`for` = "league-multi-select", class = "control-label", "LEAGUE"),
    tags$select(
      id = "league-multi-select",
      class = "control-input control-multi",
      multiple = "multiple",
      lapply(seq_len(nrow(current_league_table)), function(i) {
        row <- current_league_table[i, ]
        tags$option(
          value = row$LeagueName,
          selected = if (row$LeagueName %in% default_leagues) "selected" else NULL,
          row$LeagueName
        )
      })
    )
  ),
  div(
    class = "control-block control-block-year",
    tags$label(`for` = "league-start-year", class = "control-label", "FROM"),
    tags$select(
      id = "league-start-year",
      class = "control-input",
      lapply(available_years, function(yr) {
        tags$option(value = yr, selected = if (yr == default_start_year) "selected" else NULL, yr)
      })
    )
  ),
  div(
    class = "control-block control-block-year",
    tags$label(`for` = "league-end-year", class = "control-label", "TO"),
    tags$select(
      id = "league-end-year",
      class = "control-input",
      lapply(available_years, function(yr) {
        tags$option(value = yr, selected = if (yr == default_end_year) "selected" else NULL, yr)
      })
    )
  )
)
```

```{r league-plot}
build_league_plot(default_leagues, default_start_year, default_end_year) |>
  htmlwidgets::onRender(
    "function(el, x, data) {
      const select = document.getElementById('league-multi-select');
      const start = document.getElementById('league-start-year');
      const end = document.getElementById('league-end-year');
      const rows = data.rows || [];
      const defaultIds = data.defaultIds || [];

      function parseDateKey(value) {
        return new Date(value + 'T00:00:00');
      }

      function formatTickLabel(date, singleYear) {
        const year = String(date.getFullYear());
        const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
        const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
        return singleYear ? (month + '/' + day) : (year + '/' + month);
      }

      function addMonths(date, count) {
        const next = new Date(date.getTime());
        next.setMonth(next.getMonth() + count);
        return next;
      }

      function selectedValues() {
        const values = Array.from(select.selectedOptions).map(function(opt) { return opt.value; });
        return values.length ? values : defaultIds;
      }

      function buildAxis(filtered, startYear, endYear) {
        const events = [];
        const seen = new Set();

        filtered
          .slice()
          .sort(function(a, b) { return Number(a.event_id) - Number(b.event_id); })
          .forEach(function(row) {
            const key = String(row.event_id);
            if (!seen.has(key)) {
              seen.add(key);
              events.push({
                eventId: Number(row.event_id),
                dateKey: row.date_key
              });
            }
          });

        const slotMap = {};
        events.forEach(function(event, index) {
          slotMap[event.eventId] = index + 1;
        });

        if (!events.length) {
          return { slotMap: slotMap, tickvals: [], ticktext: [] };
        }

        const firstDate = parseDateKey(events[0].dateKey);
        const lastDate = parseDateKey(events[events.length - 1].dateKey);
        const singleYear = startYear === endYear;
        const tickvals = [];
        const ticktext = [];

        function pushTick(targetDate, fallbackEvent) {
          const targetKey = targetDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
          const matchedEvent = events.find(function(event) {
            return event.dateKey >= targetKey;
          }) || fallbackEvent;

          if (!matchedEvent) {
            return;
          }

          const slot = slotMap[matchedEvent.eventId];
          if (tickvals.length && tickvals[tickvals.length - 1] === slot) {
            return;
          }

          tickvals.push(slot);
          ticktext.push(formatTickLabel(parseDateKey(matchedEvent.dateKey), singleYear));
        }

        if (singleYear) {
          let cursor = new Date(firstDate.getTime());
          while (cursor <= lastDate) {
            pushTick(cursor, null);
            cursor = new Date(cursor.getTime() + 14 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
          }
        } else {
          const totalMonths = (lastDate.getFullYear() - firstDate.getFullYear()) * 12 +
            (lastDate.getMonth() - firstDate.getMonth()) + 1;
          const monthStep = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(totalMonths / 8));
          let cursor = new Date(firstDate.getFullYear(), firstDate.getMonth(), 1);
          while (cursor <= lastDate) {
            pushTick(cursor, null);
            cursor = addMonths(cursor, monthStep);
          }
        }

        pushTick(firstDate, events[0]);
        pushTick(lastDate, events[events.length - 1]);

        return { slotMap: slotMap, tickvals: tickvals, ticktext: ticktext };
      }

      function buildChart(selectedIds, startYear, endYear) {
        const filtered = rows.filter(function(row) {
          return selectedIds.indexOf(row.league) >= 0 && row.year >= startYear && row.year <= endYear;
        }).slice().sort(function(a, b) {
          if (a.league !== b.league) {
            return String(a.league).localeCompare(String(b.league), 'ja');
          }
          return Number(a.event_id) - Number(b.event_id);
        });

        const axis = buildAxis(filtered, startYear, endYear);

        if (!filtered.length) {
          return {
            traces: [{
              x: [],
              y: [],
              type: 'scatter',
              mode: 'lines'
            }],
            axis: axis
          };
        }

        const grouped = {};
        filtered.forEach(function(row) {
          if (!grouped[row.league]) {
            grouped[row.league] = {
              x: [],
              y: [],
              name: row.league,
              mode: 'lines+markers',
              type: 'scatter',
              connectgaps: true,
              line: { width: 3 },
              marker: { size: 5 },
              customdata: [],
              hovertemplate: '%{customdata}<br>' + row.league + ': %{y:.1f}<extra></extra>'
            };
          }
          grouped[row.league].x.push(axis.slotMap[Number(row.event_id)]);
          grouped[row.league].y.push(row.rating);
          grouped[row.league].customdata.push(row.date_key);
        });

        return {
          traces: Object.keys(grouped).map(function(key) { return grouped[key]; }),
          axis: axis
        };
      }

      function render() {
        let startYear = Number(start.value);
        let endYear = Number(end.value);
        if (startYear > endYear) {
          const next = startYear;
          startYear = endYear;
          endYear = next;
        }
        const selectedIds = selectedValues();
        const chart = buildChart(selectedIds, startYear, endYear);
        Plotly.react(el, chart.traces, {
          paper_bgcolor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0)',
          plot_bgcolor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.96)',
          margin: { l: 48, r: 20, t: 20, b: 44 },
          xaxis: {
            title: '',
            tickmode: 'array',
            tickvals: chart.axis.tickvals,
            ticktext: chart.axis.ticktext,
            showgrid: true,
            gridcolor: 'rgba(23,50,74,0.14)',
            zeroline: false
          },
          yaxis: { title: 'RATING' },
          legend: { orientation: 'h', x: 0, y: 1.12 }
        }, { displayModeBar: false, responsive: true });
      }

      [select, start, end].forEach(function(node) {
        node.addEventListener('change', render);
      });

      render();
    }",
    data = league_plot_payload
  )
```

```{r league-table}
div(
  class = "table-shell",
  build_league_table(
    current_league_table,
    page_size = nrow(current_league_table),
    searchable = TRUE,
    show_pagination = FALSE
  )
)
```
